---
title: "Edmund Charles Yonge"
---

## Edmund Charles Yonge

**Dates:** (11 Aug 1827-12 or 15  Jan 1847)

### Description

cousin of CMY

### Biography

Known as Charles Yonge, he was the fifth son of Rev John Yonge of Puslinch and Alethea Bargus, CMY describes him as  \'born on my birthday in 1827\' [a tablet in Newton Ferrars church says \'d. Jan 15 1847 aged 19 years\']

### Letters

- [To Marianne Bigg Wither, August, 11[[footnote:1]] 1898.](../letters/3380_To_Marianne_Bigg_Wither.html)
- Letter from July 28th [1893?]
- Letter from September 11, 1869
- Letter from Friday 30th Oct? [sic] [1846]
- Letter from Sept 24th [1846[[footnote:1]]]
- Letter from April 19th  [1845[[footnote:1]]]
- Letter from Decr 13th [1844]
- Letter from Wednesday 5 [December 1838]
- Letter from 25 September 1838
- Letter from July 4, 1834

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
